leads.title: Co-founder & CFO
leads.headline: Co-founder & CFO
leads.company_description: Kaluah Tours is a United States-based wholesale travel distributor and tour operator that serves travel agencies and tour operators globally. The company provides a comprehensive range of services, including hotel accommodations, attraction tickets, car rentals, transportation, cruises, and customized travel packages through an online booking system.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.company_description: Entire Travel Group is an Australian wholesale tour operator that curates and delivers holiday packages through partnerships with global providers. Established in 1971, the company serves the travel market by offering experience-backed itineraries and exclusive products supported by enhanced customer service technology.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.headline: Managing Director at Albatross Travel
leads.company_address: str. 9 Mai, nr. 1, Bucuresti, Sector 6 060351, RO
leads.company_description: Albatross Travel Group is a United Kingdom-based group tour operator and wholesaler founded in 1985. The company manages over 2,100 tours annually across the UK and continental Europe, providing wholesale group accommodation and inbound travel services to coach operators and international travel partners.

leads.title: Co-Founder
leads.headline: Co-founder Newmarket Holidays

leads.company_description: Newmarket Holidays is a United Kingdom-based tour operator founded in 1983 that provides escorted holidays, resort-based stays, and event-based tours. Operating from its Surrey headquarters, the company serves travelers with a wide range of cruise, short-break, and worldwide holiday packages.

leads.title: Managing Director

leads.company_description: Paragon Plus is a United Kingdom-based tour operator specializing in package holidays, group travel, and customized tours to Mediterranean destinations. The company provides comprehensive travel services, including flight bookings, hotel accommodations, transfers, and guided excursions for escorted tours, ski packages, and beach holidays.

leads.title: Group Head of Operations and Projects for JTA Travel

leads.company_description: JTA Travel Group is a United Kingdom-based tour operator and travel provider established in 1972 that serves travel agents and industry professionals. The company offers a comprehensive portfolio of travel services, including scheduled and charter flights, worldwide accommodations, ocean and river cruises, and rail packages.

leads.headline: Director
leads.company_description: Travel Seen Limited is a United Kingdom-based luxury travel group that functions as both a travel agency and a tour operator. The company acts as a curated marketplace, offering personalized itineraries and travel experiences by connecting customers with a network of partner travel companies.

leads.company_description: Asia Pacific Travel, Ltd. is a United States-based upscale tour operator specializing in first-class and deluxe travel to the Asia-Pacific region. leads.company_description: Voyage By Pascale is a United States-based boutique wholesale company dedicated to serving the luxury travel advisor community. The firm focuses on building professional relationships to provide travel advisors with the resources and support necessary to deliver high-end, customized luxury travel experiences to their clients.

leads.company_description: Jet Vacations is a United States-based tour operator located in Naples, Florida, specializing in customized group travel since 1982. The company designs and arranges tailored itineraries for various organizations, including schools, clubs, and associations, to provide comprehensive and memorable group travel experiences.
